$notes.identity_columns_activation: identityColumns is activated by the presence of delta.identity.* metadata keys on a column in the schema. At writerVersion 7, the identityColumns feature must also be listed in writerFeatures. At writerVersion 6, the feature is supported implicitly with no feature flag required.
$notes.identity_columns_high_water_mark: highWaterMark tracks the highest (or lowest, for negative step) value generated so far. The fixtures use start - step as the uninitialized sentinel (e.g. start=1, step=1 gives highWaterMark=0). This is a common convention; the spec does not define an initialization value.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_1_7_feature_listed_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with a column carrying delta.identity.* metadata succeeds.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_1_7_no_feature_listed_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,7) table with identity column metadata in the schema but without identityColumns in writerFeatures succeeds.

cases.name: identity_columns_read_snapshot_1_7_feature_listed_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with an identity column schema succeeds; identityColumns is writer-only and readers are not required to validate or generate identity values.

cases.name: identity_columns_empty_commit_1_7_feature_listed_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Appending (empty commit) to a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with an identity column schema succeeds; the empty commit does not generate any identity values.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_1_6_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,6) table with a column carrying delta.identity.* metadata succeeds; writer version 6 provides implicit identity column support without a writerFeatures flag.

cases.name: identity_columns_read_snapshot_1_6_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,6) table with an identity column schema succeeds; identityColumns is writer-only.

cases.name: identity_columns_empty_commit_1_6_with_identity_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Appending (empty commit) to a (1,6) table with an identity column schema succeeds.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_1_7_step_zero_fails
cases.description: Creating a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with a column where delta.identity.step=0 fails; the spec explicitly prohibits a zero step value.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_1_7_negative_step_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with a column where delta.identity.step=-1 succeeds; negative step is valid and generates a descending sequence.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_1_7_allow_explicit_insert_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with a column where delta.identity.allowExplicitInsert=true succeeds.

cases.name: identity_columns_cm_create_table_3_7_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[columnMapping,identityColumns] table with a CM-annotated identity column succeeds.

cases.name: identity_columns_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with delta.identity.* metadata in the schema but identityColumns absent from writerFeatures succeeds; identityColumns is writer-only.

cases.name: identity_columns_supported_not_active_empty_commit_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (1,7)+[identityColumns] table with no identity column in the schema succeeds; with no delta.identity.* metadata on any field, no identity enforcement is required.

cases.name: identity_columns_create_table_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_identity_schema_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with delta.identity.* metadata in the schema but identityColumns absent from writerFeatures fails.

cases.name: identity_columns_empty_commit_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_identity_schema_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table with delta.identity.* metadata in the schema but identityColumns absent from writerFeatures fails.
